title: Fix subclass with rand_mode(0) getting randomized

features.name: rand_mode(0) on subclass field
features.description: Code should include a rand variable inside a subclass that has rand_mode(0) called on it via a method, where the parent class containing the subclass instance calls randomize()
features.snippet:
class child extends parent; rand int x; function void set_rand_mode(bit mode); x.rand_mode(mode); endfunction endclass
class parent; child c; function new; c = new; endfunction endclass
task t; parent p = new; p.c.set_rand_mode(0); p.randomize(); endtask

features.name: constraint_mode inside set_rand_mode
features.description: Code should include a set_rand_mode function that calls both rand_mode() and constraint_mode() on the same variable to disable randomization and constraints together
features.snippet: class c; rand int x; constraint cst { x < 10; } function void set_rand_mode(bit mode); x.rand_mode(mode); cst.constraint_mode(mode); endfunction endclass

features.name: class inheritance with rand members
features.description: Code should include a class inheritance hierarchy where the parent class contains rand members of a subclass type, and those members are randomized via the parent class randomize() call
features.snippet:
class parent; endclass
class child extends parent; rand int x; endclass
class top; child c; function new; c = new; endfunction endclass
top t; t = new; t.randomize();
